short_summary: Oil prices ease, no major shocks
rationale: Continued oil price decline offers mild cost-of-living relief for Portuguese residents; no other headlines have meaningful direct impact on Portugal this cycle.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: Ongoing oil price decline continues to modestly ease energy and transport costs for Portuguese households, though this is a continuation of an established trend.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in nearby Spain (Cártama) is a minor regional safety note; no direct impact on Portugal but relevant to Iberian tourism sector awareness.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A large UK-Japan investment deal has negligible direct impact on Portugal but signals continued global trade activity relevant to EU economic environment.
